name: Notelert

releases.author: Joaquim-Frances
releases.description:
# Notelert Plugin v1.1.9

This release introduces official visual app badges in the README and synchronizes the codebase with all modern adjustments from the main monorepo.

## Key Changes:

- **Official App Store & Play Store Badges:** Upgraded the plain text Google Play link in the README.md to use the official Google Play badge. Added a beautiful iOS App Store badge that redirects Apple users to the high-converting iPhone waiting list on the official Notelert website.
- **Visual Sizing Enhancements:** Fine-tuned the vertical alignment of the badges within the documentation using precise height limits, achieving a sleek and premium finish.
- **Robust Code Synchronization:** Standardized the core plugin features with the monorepo's newest logic, incorporating active past date/time validation checks, localized i18n helper improvements, and visual spacing optimizations.

## Release Assets:

- `main.js` (Compiled code)
- `manifest.json` (Plugin manifest metadata)
- `styles.css` (Visual styling sheet)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Notelert Plugin v1.1.8

This release synchronizes the Obsidian plugin with the latest robust changes from the Notelert monorepo, introducing major visual improvements, premium gating, internationalization, and authentication stability.

## Key Changes:

- **Location Reminders Dashboard & Grouping:** Improved layout and grouped location reminders within the dashboard for a cleaner overview.
- **Enhanced OAuth Refresh Logic:** Refined the background silent refresh token mechanism to ensure reliable credentials.
- **Premium Validation & Gating:** Reinforced strict error handling and security gating for premium features (such as location-based features) to match mobile subscription status.
- **Internationalization (i18n):** Added missing translations and localization supports for snoozing and app settings.
- **Mobile Connectivity & Onboarding:** Refined active checking for mobile connections and streamlined the integration flow.

## Release Assets:

- `main.js` (Compiled code)
- `manifest.json` (Plugin manifest metadata)
- `styles.css` (Visual styling sheet)

releases.description:
# Notelert Plugin v1.1.5

## Review and documentation updates

- Updated the settings UI copy to use App link token consistently.
- Corrected the Google Play link for the Notelert Android app.
- Fixed language switching in the plugin settings screen.
- Removed the visible debug mode card from plugin settings.
- Adjusted the app-required banner layout so long translated text does not overlap the close button.
- Removed DOM API usage that triggered Obsidian review warnings.
- Rewrote the README to describe the current Firebase scheduling flow, Android app requirement, privacy model, Premium features, and testing status.

## Release assets

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: Joaquim-Frances
releases.description:
# 🎉 Notelert Plugin v1.0.0 - First Release

## Bridge Obsidian with Android Notifications

**Notelert** is a powerful Obsidian plugin that seamlessly connects your notes with Android native notifications. Create reminders directly from your notes and receive them on your mobile device in less than 2 seconds.

## ✨ Key Features

### 📱 **Mobile Integration**
- Create notifications from Obsidian that sync to your Android device
- Fast deeplink-based communication (under 2 seconds)
- Automatic return to Obsidian after notification is set

### ⏰ **Time-Based Notifications**
- Trigger date/time picker with `:@` syntax
- Quick actions for common times (today, tomorrow, +1 hour, +2 hours)
- Intuitive time picker interface

### 📍 **Location-Based Notifications** (Premium)
- Set reminders based on location using geofencing
- Save favorite locations for quick access
- Google Maps integration for location search

### 📧 **Email Notifications** (Premium)
- Receive email reminders alongside push notifications
- Works on both mobile and desktop
- Firebase-powered reliable delivery

### 🖥️ **Desktop Support**
- Full email notification support on desktop
- Manage scheduled emails from plugin settings
- No mobile app required for desktop users

## 🚀 Quick Start

1. **Install the plugin** from Obsidian Community Plugins
2. **Download the Notelert app** from Google Play (beta)
3. **Type `:@`** in any note to trigger the date/time picker
4. **Select your notification time** and confirm
5. **Done!** The notification is set in your Android system

## 📺 Demo Videos

- [Demo Video 1](https://youtube.com/shorts/7So2Wmqgnjo)
- [Demo Video 2](https://youtube.com/shorts/gm-CqmlDU-0)

## 🔒 Privacy & Security

- **No vault scanning** - The plugin only reads the note title and reminder line
- **No data collection** - All data is used solely for notification purposes
- **Token-based authentication** for premium features

## 💎 Premium Features

The plugin is **completely free**, but the mobile app offers:
- **Free Mode**: Up to 5 active reminders
- **Premium Mode**: Unlimited reminders + Location notifications + Email notifications

## 📋 Requirements

- Obsidian v0.15.0 or higher
- Notelert mobile app (available in Google Play beta)
- Android device for mobile notifications

## 🐛 Known Limitations

- Desktop mode only supports email notifications (no push notifications)
- Location notifications require Premium subscription
- App is currently in open beta testing

## 🙏 Special Thanks

This is the first public release of Notelert. We're excited to share it with the Obsidian community and welcome your feedback!

---

**Note**: The mobile app is currently in
